authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly acknowledged the XML vs JSON discrepancy between older sources (D2 test asserting application/xml; D3 customer reporting XML) and current v2.0 sources (D1 JSON; D4 'BREAKING: /users endpoint now returns JSON (was XML in v1.x)'). It resolved in favor of the authoritative, time-scoped v2.0 docs/changelog, citing the effective date (Jan 1, 2025) and D4's explicit note that legacy tests should not be used for v2 validation.
